title: ME8 7UA, Southern Water Services Limited: environmental permit issued -EPR/BP3103MS/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Southern Water Services Limited   Installation name: Motney Hill Sludge Treatment Centre (STC)   Permit number: EPR/BP3103MS   "
